privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the agent constructs a new 3D model from a blank canvas. Verified the expected output file paths (/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/stair_stringer.slvs and .stl) match the instructions and verifier logic. Mathematically verified the expected bounding box dimensions [40, 720, 1120] based on the geometric requirements: 4 risers of 180mm (Y=720), 4 treads of 280mm (X=1120), and an extrusion thickness of 40mm (Z=40). Confirmed the minimum of 11 lines and a maximum of 6 distance constraints directly align with the explicit constraints required to model the stair stringer correctly.
